description.value: Driving sleet blocks all sight (even darkvision ) within it and causes the ground in the area to be icy. A creature can walk within or through the area of sleet at half normal speed with a DC 10 Acrobatics check. Failure means it can’t move in that round, while failure by 5 or more means it falls (see the Acrobatics skill for details). The sleet extinguishes torches and small fires. By the way… The sleet, snow, and ice created by this spell does not move with a ship, but the deck is considered icy. This spell also allows a ship to make an additional saving throw to extinguish fires.
